evals.prompt: I have a raw idea for a Labs21 product and need the first strategic blueprint, MVP shape, and architecture direction. Where should this go?
evals.expected_output: Routes to labs21-product-suite/labs21-chief-architect because the request is still at Stage 1 and needs strategy plus MVP framing before any PRD or system-architecture work.

evals.prompt: We already validated the blueprint. Turn it into a PRD with user stories, acceptance criteria, and edge cases.
evals.expected_output: Routes to labs21-product-suite/labs21-prd-writer because the blueprint already exists and the remaining job is Stage 2 product definition.

evals.prompt: A validated PRD exists. Define the schema, API contracts, state flows, and infrastructure for v1.
evals.expected_output: Routes to labs21-product-suite/labs21-system-architect because the request is Stage 3 system design from an approved PRD.

evals.prompt: Please complete the entire system design for a brand-new product, but we do not have a blueprint or PRD yet.
evals.expected_output: Routes to labs21-product-suite/labs21-chief-architect because the missing blueprint and PRD make this a Stage 1 strategy problem first, even though the user is asking for a later-stage artifact.
